title: Principal/Superintendent (Put-in-Bay Local School District; Middle Bass students attend Put-in-Bay)
notes: Middle Bass Local has had no operating school since 1982. The ~4 students residing on Middle Bass attend Put-in-Bay Local Schools (South Bass Island). Scott Mangas serves as combined Principal/Superintendent. No district website or independent staff. Email not published.
